evals.prompt: I want to add CORS middleware to my FastAPI app so the Next.js frontend on localhost:3000 can call the API during development. Where should I put this and how?
evals.expected_output: A new file or addition in cross_cutting/ with a CORSMiddleware configuration and a registration function called from main.py.
expectations: Creates or modifies a file in backend/app/cross_cutting/
Uses FastAPI/Starlette CORSMiddleware with allow_origins for localhost:3000
Provides a register function following the existing pattern
Does not put CORS config inside any module

evals.prompt: I need to add a request ID header to every response so I can trace errors. Every request should get a UUID in the X-Request-ID header.
evals.expected_output: A new ASGI middleware in cross_cutting/request_id_middleware.py that generates a UUID and sets it on the response headers.
expectations: Creates a new middleware file in cross_cutting/
Uses ASGI or Starlette BaseHTTPMiddleware pattern
Generates a UUID for each request
Provides a registration function for main.py
